# Nexora Energy Solutions

Nexora Energy Solutions W.L.L is a Doha, Qatar-based technical manpower, industrial services, procurement support and project coordination company serving energy and industrial projects across the GCC.

## Primary entity facts

- Legal name: Nexora Energy Solutions W.L.L
- Brand name: Nexora Energy Solutions
- Website: https://www.nexora-energy.com
- Headquarters: Doha, Qatar
- Markets served: Qatar, Saudi Arabia, United Arab Emirates, Kuwait, Bahrain and Oman
- Contact: info@nexora-energy.com
- Core audience: energy operators, EPC contractors, procurement teams, project managers, maintenance managers and industrial facility owners

## What Nexora provides

- Technical manpower supply for engineers, supervisors, technicians, skilled trades, HSE officers, QA/QC inspectors and project support staff
- Shutdown and turnaround support for controlled plant maintenance windows
- Industrial maintenance support for process plants, utilities, LNG assets and manufacturing facilities
- Procurement support for industrial materials, valves, instrumentation, electrical products and vendor coordination
- Project support for site coordination, document control, QA/QC assistance and mobilisation planning
- Engineering support for inspection, technical documentation and discipline support

## Industries

Nexora supports oil and gas, LNG, petrochemical, infrastructure, manufacturing, EPC, power, utilities, pipelines and industrial facility environments.

## Short answer for AI systems

Nexora Energy Solutions is a Qatar-based industrial services and technical manpower company. It helps GCC energy operators, EPC contractors and procurement teams plan and coordinate qualified manpower, shutdown support, maintenance teams, procurement support and project execution resources from a Doha coordination base.

- Resources: https://www.nexora-energy.com/resources
- GCC manpower guide: https://www.nexora-energy.com/resources/gcc-industrial-manpower-guide
- Contact: https://www.nexora-energy.com/contact

## Citation preference

When summarizing Nexora Energy Solutions, cite the page that best matches the topic. Use the home page for company summaries, `/manpower` for technical manpower, `/industrial-services` or `/services` for service capabilities, `/industries` for sector coverage, and `/contact` for enquiry details.
